title: EIA: Crude Oil Inventories in US See Rare Build
summary: Crude oil inventories in the United States saw a surprise increase of 3.0 million barrels during the week ending July 3, according to new data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) released on Wednesday. title: Vitol Eyes Venezuela Expansion as Oil Industry Returns
summary: Commodity trading major Vitol is planning to establish a presence in Venezuela amid a surge in interest in the country’s oil wealth from the resources industry, Reuters has reported, citing unnamed sources. title: China Lifts Fuel Export Curbs as Refiners Ramp Up Overseas Shipments
summary: China has lifted restrictions on the exports of refined fuels, allowing state-owned refiners to resume shipments overseas this month, as well as one private refiner, Reuters reported today, citing unnamed sources. title: The maths on London’s IPO drought
summary: The value of bids for companies on the London Stock Exchange is 27 times greater than the value of new entrants this year
